news.title: Strategy Shoots Own Foot: Bitcoin Dive Will Cost It $26 Mil A Year
news.summary: Strategy's sale of $2.5 million bitcoin, which helped precipitate this week's dive for the cryptocurrency, appears likely to hike its annual financing costs by $26 million.  After sinking in heavy volume to start the month, Strategy's Stretch variable rate preferred stock with the STRC ticker has an untenably steep mountain to climb to avoid a ratcheting up of its dividend rate by 25 basis points to 11.75% on all $10.5 billion of the outstanding securities.  Strategy has an out if it wants.
